questions.context: Name must be explicit and canonical (no inference).

questions.context: Purpose must be explicit and scoped to a single skill capability.

options.description: Covers voice, pipeline, and privacy as foundational policies
options.impact: Broad foundational scope, other content skills depend on this
options.label: Voice + pipeline + privacy

options.description: Narrowly scoped to voice and style only

options.label: Voice only
options.value: Define and enforce authentic voice characteristics and writing style for all content on nickthiru.dev

options.label: Full content orchestration
options.value: Orchestrate all content creation including voice, pipeline, strategy, SEO, and distribution for nickthiru.dev
